title: GGUF Vision Model Spec
description: GGUF vision model specification for image description.
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies a GGUF-format vision-language model used for image captioning and visual question answering via the llama.cpp GGUF backend. The model accepts both text and image inputs and produces text output.

## When to use
Use this spec type when wiring an image description cap that targets the GGUF backend. The default points to moondream2, a compact open vision model. Swap the default for any GGUF-compatible vision model (e.g., LLaVA variants).

## Notes
Vision GGUF models typically require a separate image projection weights file (`.mmproj`) alongside the main `.gguf` file. Ensure the model repository contains both files before running inference.
